name: Xiaomei and the Flame Dragon's Fist
short_description: The story revolves around two sisters: Xiao Mei, the master of the Flame Dragon Fist, and Xiao Ying, the master of the opposing fist, the Dark Dragon Slaying Fist, and Xiao Mei's older sister. Xiao Mei is fascinated by the power of the Dark Dragon and sets out to save her sister who has disappeared.
detailed_description:
The story revolves around two sisters: Xiao Mei, the master of the Flame Dragon Fist, and Xiao Ying, the master of the opposing fist, the Dark Dragon Slaying Fist, and Xiao Mei's older sister. Xiaomei is fascinated by the power of the Dark Dragon and sets out to save her sister who has disappeared.

Use punches, kicks, and special moves to defeat enemy characters as they appear.

A tough boss awaits at the end of each stage.

With music by legendary former Namco composer Norio Nakagata (“Ranrenbo Tengu,” “Genpei Umaiden,” “Thunder Scepter,” “Chozetsu Rinjin Bellaboman,” etc.), this nostalgic kung fu action game pays homage to 16-bit game consoles with a limited number of colors and limited resolution.

The cool FM-style sound is a must-listen!
about_the_game:
The story revolves around two sisters: Xiao Mei, the master of the Flame Dragon Fist, and Xiao Ying, the master of the opposing fist, the Dark Dragon Slaying Fist, and Xiao Mei's older sister. Xiaomei is fascinated by the power of the Dark Dragon and sets out to save her sister who has disappeared.

Use punches, kicks, and special moves to defeat enemy characters as they appear.

A tough boss awaits at the end of each stage.

With music by legendary former Namco composer Norio Nakagata (“Ranrenbo Tengu,” “Genpei Umaiden,” “Thunder Scepter,” “Chozetsu Rinjin Bellaboman,” etc.), this nostalgic kung fu action game pays homage to 16-bit game consoles with a limited number of colors and limited resolution.

The cool FM-style sound is a must-listen!
